{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Phonics Facilitator",
  "description": "Doxa Educational Consult is a training platform for young and old graduate towards employeability.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Phonics Facilitator

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose


	To deliver structured Oral English, Diction, and Phonics instruction to students in partner schools, ensuring improvement in pronunciation, communication skills, and language confidence in line with curriculum and organisational standards.


Key Responsibilities (KRAs)
Instruction Delivery:


	Teach Oral English, Diction, and Phonics effectively across assigned schools.
	Deliver lessons in line with approved curriculum and lesson plans.
	Conduct pronunciation drills, reading exercises, and speech development sessions.


Student Development &amp; Assessment:


	Monitor student progress and provide periodic performance feedback
	Conduct assessments to evaluate improvement in speech and communication skills
	Identify students requiring additional language support


Classroom &amp; Professional Conduct:


	Maintain discipline and a conducive learning environment.
	Demonstrate professionalism and adherence to school and company policies.
	Serve as a positive communication role model for students.


Reporting &amp; Administration:


	Prepare lesson plans and submit weekly activity reports.
	Maintain attendance and student performance records.
	Participate in training, supervision, and quality assurance reviews.


Requirements
Education:


	
	Minimum NCE / OND / HND / B.Ed / B.A in English, Linguistics, Education, or related field.
	


Experience:


	
	1&ndash;3 years of teaching or facilitation experience in:

	
		Oral English
		Diction / Phonics
		Speech or communication training.
	
	


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Clear pronunciation and strong spoken English
	Ability to teach phonics and speech development techniques
	Classroom management skills
	Confidence speaking before children
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Patience and enthusiasm for teaching


Working Conditions:


	Deployment to partner schools within Ibadan and other states.
	Structured lesson schedules across assigned locations.
	Training will be provided to ensure teaching standardization.
	Performance-based review and growth opportunity.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;royaljedhrsupport@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only qualified candidate will be contacted via mail and phone calls.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",

  },

Phonics Facilitator Job at Doxa Educational Consult




        
    

        
        Doxa Educational Consult is a training platform for young and old graduate towards employeability.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Phonics Facilitator

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose


	To deliver structured Oral English, Diction, and Phonics instruction to students in partner schools, ensuring improvement in pronunciation, communication skills, and language confidence in line with curriculum and organisational standards.


Key Responsibilities (KRAs)
Instruction Delivery:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Teach Oral English, Diction, and Phonics effectively across assigned schools.
	Deliver lessons in line with approved curriculum and lesson plans.
	Conduct pronunciation drills, reading exercises, and speech development sessions.


Student Development & Assessment:


	Monitor student progress and provide periodic performance feedback
	Conduct assessments to evaluate improvement in speech and communication skills
	Identify students requiring additional language support


Classroom & Professional Conduct:


	Maintain discipline and a conducive learning environment.
	Demonstrate professionalism and adherence to school and company policies.
	Serve as a positive communication role model for students.


Reporting & Administration:


	Prepare lesson plans and submit weekly activity reports.
	Maintain attendance and student performance records.
	Participate in training, supervision, and quality assurance reviews.


Requirements
Education:


	
	Minimum NCE / OND / HND / B.Ed / B.A in English, Linguistics, Education, or related field.
	


Experience:


	
	1–3 years of teaching or facilitation experience in:

	
		Oral English
		Diction / Phonics
		Speech or communication training.
	
	


Skills & Competencies:


	Clear pronunciation and strong spoken English
	Ability to teach phonics and speech development techniques
	Classroom management skills
	Confidence speaking before children
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Patience and enthusiasm for teaching


Working Conditions:


	Deployment to partner schools within Ibadan and other states.
	Structured lesson schedules across assigned locations.
	Training will be provided to ensure teaching standardization.
	Performance-based review and growth opportunity.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only qualified candidate will be contacted via mail and phone calls.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Account Clerk Job at Compovine Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Compovine Technologies Limited is an indigenous company with the main aim of offering Information Technology, Sales and Services to individuals and corporate organizations. Compovine Technology Limited currently has branches in Ibadan, Abuja, Lagos, Lokoja, Kano, Kaduna, Jos, Minna, Port Harcourt and Enugu, and we are still expanding.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Clerk

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Qualifications
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s Degree with 3 - 10 years of experience.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Female Accounts Supervisor",
  "description": "Paragon Corporate Enterprises is an indigenous company located in&nbsp;the heart of Aba, Abia State.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Accounts Supervisor

Job Location:&nbsp;Aba, Abia
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are urgenetly in need of Female Account supervisor with good experience in financial accounting and book keeping.


Requirements


	She must possess at least OND / NCE / HND in Accounting, good in computer.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "AI / Full Stack Engineer",
  "description": "Havana Group has a number of companies under its porfolio. We&#39;re into real estate, media, technology and hospitality.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: AI / Full Stack Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	You will enjoy working with us if you&#39;re a talented young, vibrant, energetic, creativeand ambitious individual who wants to work with a team of other champions, in an environment that sponsors growth and development.
	If you&#39;re not intimidated with greatness, you&#39;re welcome to join our team.


Key Responsibilities
WordPress Development:


	Develop, customize, and maintain WordPress websites and themes.
	Implement responsive designs using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
	Build and customize WordPress plugins to meet specific business needs.
	Ensure WordPress sites are secure, optimized, and regularly updated.


Full-Stack Development:


	Design and develop scalable web applications using both front-end and back-end technologies.
	Work with PHP, Node.js, Python, or other backend frameworks.
	Implement REST APIs and integrate with third-party services.
	Manage database design, optimization, and integration (MySQL, PostgreSQL, or NoSQL).


AI Engineering &amp; Integration:


	Design and implement AI-driven features such as chatbots, recommendation engines, or predictive analytics.
	Integrate AI/ML models into web applications using Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar frameworks.
	Collaborate with data scientists to deploy machine learning models effectively.
	Monitor AI solutions for performance and scalability.


Cross-Functional Collaboration:


	Collaborate with UI/UX designers, content creators, and marketing teams to deliver functional and visually appealing products.
	Provide technical guidance on best practices for WordPress and full-stack development.
	Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize existing applications.


Maintenance &amp; Documentation:


	Maintain detailed technical documentation for developed applications and plugins.
	Perform regular audits for code quality, security, and performance.
	Stay updated with the latest web development and AI technologies.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.
	3- 5 years of experience in WordPress development.
	Strong full-stack development experience (front-end and back-end).
	Proficiency in PHP, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and modern frameworks (React, Angular, Vue.js).
	Experience with database systems (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
	Knowledge of AI/ML frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, or similar.
	Experience integrating AI features into web applications.
	Understanding of REST APIs, cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP), and version control (Git).
	Strong problem-solving skills, creativity, and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	Experience with AI-powered automation for web or business processes.
	Knowledge of SEO and website performance optimization.
	Experience with server management and deployment pipelines (CI/CD).


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates are invited to submit their CV to:&nbsp;hrsupport@9figuremedia.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the email.",

AI / Full Stack Engineer Job at Havana Group




        
    

        
        Havana Group has a number of companies under its porfolio. We're into real estate, media, technology and hospitality.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: AI / Full Stack Engineer

Job Location: Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	You will enjoy working with us if you're a talented young, vibrant, energetic, creativeand ambitious individual who wants to work with a team of other champions, in an environment that sponsors growth and development.
	If you're not intimidated with greatness, you're welcome to join our team.


Key Responsibilities
WordPress Development:


	Develop, customize, and maintain WordPress websites and themes.
	Implement responsive designs using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
	Build and customize WordPress plugins to meet specific business needs.
	Ensure WordPress sites are secure, optimized, and regularly updated.


Full-Stack Development:


	Design and develop scalable web applications using both front-end and back-end technologies.
	Work with PHP, Node.js, Python, or other backend frameworks.
	Implement REST APIs and integrate with third-party services.
	Manage database design, optimization, and integration (MySQL, PostgreSQL, or NoSQL).


AI Engineering & Integration:


	Design and implement AI-driven features such as chatbots, recommendation engines, or predictive analytics.
	Integrate AI/ML models into web applications using Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar frameworks.
	Collaborate with data scientists to deploy machine learning models effectively.
	Monitor AI solutions for performance and scalability.


Cross-Functional Collaboration:


	Collaborate with UI/UX designers, content creators, and marketing teams to deliver functional and visually appealing products.
	Provide technical guidance on best practices for WordPress and full-stack development.
	Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize existing applications.


Maintenance & Documentation:


	Maintain detailed technical documentation for developed applications and plugins.
	Perform regular audits for code quality, security, and performance.
	Stay updated with the latest web development and AI technologies.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.
	3- 5 years of experience in WordPress development.
	Strong full-stack development experience (front-end and back-end).
	Proficiency in PHP, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and modern frameworks (React, Angular, Vue.js).
	Experience with database systems (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
	Knowledge of AI/ML frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, or similar.
	Experience integrating AI features into web applications.
	Understanding of REST APIs, cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP), and version control (Git).
	Strong problem-solving skills, creativity, and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	Experience with AI-powered automation for web or business processes.
	Knowledge of SEO and website performance optimization.
	Experience with server management and deployment pipelines (CI/CD).


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates are invited to submit their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

The clinic specializes in state-of-the-art laser and skincare solutions, offering services such as laser hair removal, skin rejuvenation, acne treatment, pigmentation correction, and body contouring.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos

Job Role&nbsp;


	To provide cosmetic non-surgical aesthetic treatments.
	Give advise on recommended treatment plans.
	Customer service relation.


Requirements
Qualities you must have:


	Professional and friendly, good communication skills.
	High level of customer service and exceptional client care.
	Good organizational skills.
	Aesthetic &amp; Great appearance.
	Good sales &amp; marketing ability.


Please Do Not Apply:


	If Your Customer Service Skills is not up to Par.
	If you can not work using own initiatives or lazy.
	If you don not have passion for the job position.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, credentials (certification &amp; license) and a full picture of themselves to:&nbsp;celebclinics@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Receptionist Job at Celeb Laser Aesthetics Clinic




        
    

        
        Celeb Laser Aesthetics Clinic is a premier beauty and wellness destination dedicated to delivering advanced, non-invasive aesthetic treatments tailored to enhance natural beauty and boost confidence. The clinic specializes in state-of-the-art laser and skincare solutions, offering services such as laser hair removal, skin rejuvenation, acne treatment, pigmentation correction, and body contouring.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos

Job Role 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	To provide cosmetic non-surgical aesthetic treatments.
	Give advise on recommended treatment plans.
	Customer service relation.


Requirements
Qualities you must have:


	Professional and friendly, good communication skills.
	High level of customer service and exceptional client care.
	Good organizational skills.
	Aesthetic & Great appearance.
	Good sales & marketing ability.


Please Do Not Apply:


	If Your Customer Service Skills is not up to Par.
	If you can not work using own initiatives or lazy.
	If you don not have passion for the job position.


Method of Application
